title: Realistic Human Pain and Suffering
body:
Realistic Human Pain and Suffering is a body health mod modeled after mods such as [First Aid](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/first-aid) and [Realistic Health](https://modrinth.com/datapack/realistic-health). It introduces a new health system where each part of your body can take damage individually. Taking too much damage to your toso or head is fatal and will kill you instantly. I incorporated the ray tracing from the First Aid mod so things like melee damage and projectiles will damage the correct part of the body they hit. This mod is meant to be a spiritual successor to [Body Health System](https://modrinth.com/mod/body-health-system) that avoids many of the issues it had (such as the infinite death lock if you had the Instant Health Effect)
Items - Medicinal Herb (Crafted from flowers and used for Morphine and Bandages)
- Morphine (Grants an additional level of Sedation after each use)
- Bandage (Small Heals)
- Medkit (Big heals)
Effects - Sedated (Lowers the level of debuffs from damage)
- Overdosed (After getting sedated too much, Bad beduffs for 5 minutes, cant use milk to get rid of them)
